tasks.subject: Task 1: Batch FashionIndex scraper â€” one session for all FI order IDs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `scrapeOrderRows(fiOrderId)` with `scrapeAllOrderRows(fiOrderIds[])` so the browser is launched once, logged in once, and all FI order IDs are fetched in the same session.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `scrapeAllOrderRows` is a public method on `FashionIndexScraper`
- [ ] `scrapeOrderRows` (singular) is removed
- [ ] Browser is launched and closed exactly once per call to `scrapeAllOrderRows`
- [ ] All private helpers (`loginFashionIndex`, `fetchOrderRows`, `scrapeItemsFromPage`) are unchanged

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ zero errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scrapeAllOrderRows is a public method on FashionIndexScraper", "scrapeOrderRows (singular) is removed", "Browser is launched and closed exactly once per call", "All private helpers are unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Batch Doodoo520 scraper â€” one session for all doodoo order IDs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `scrapeDoodooOrder(doodooOrderId)` with `scrapeAllDoodooOrders(orderIds[])` so one browser session logs in once and loops through all order IDs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `scrapeAllDoodooOrders` returns `Promise<Map<string, DoodooOrderItem[]>>`
- [ ] `scrapeDoodooOrder` (singular) is removed
- [ ] Browser launched and closed exactly once
- [ ] Empty input returns empty Map without browser launch
- [ ] For each order ID: search â†’ navigate to detail â†’ scrape â†’ navigate back
- [ ] Missing detail link sets [] and continues loop

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ zero errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scrapeAllDoodooOrders returns Promise<Map<string, DoodooOrderItem[]>>", "scrapeDoodooOrder (singular) is removed", "Browser launched and closed exactly once", "Empty input returns empty Map without browser launch", "Missing detail link sets [] and continues loop"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Restructure pipeline into two phases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite `runPipeline` in `FashionIndexService` to call `scrapeAllOrderRows` then `scrapeAllDoodooOrders` â€” one browser session per site â€” and join the results for comparison.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All acceptance criteria met
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
- doodoo_not_found test coverage added

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ zero errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.ts", "doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["runPipeline does not reference scrapeOrderRows or scrapeDoodooOrder", "All FI rows collected before Doodoo scraping begins", "Duplicate doodoo IDs deduplicated", "TypeScript compiles with zero errors"]}
```
